description: Agent lifecycle hooks — identity injection, cron reconcile, PostToolUse cron capture, memory flush, session summary.

hooks.command: echo '[clawcode] Context nearing compaction. Save important information from this conversation to memory/'$(date +%Y-%m-%d)'.md — APPEND only, do not overwrite existing entries. If nothing to save, skip.'

echo '[clawcode] Session ending. If this was a significant conversation, write a brief summary to memory/'$(date +%Y-%m-%d)'.md before closing. Include: what was discussed, decisions made, open items.'
